title: Numscript fixture library
description: Named fixtures consumed by the docs Numscript validator and playground-link generator. Snippets reference an entry via `{input: "<key>"}` on their fence info string.

description.description: Short blurb shown in the backoffice fixture list.

variables.description: Variable values for the snippet's `vars { … }` block. Keys are variable names without the `$` prefix; values are stringified per the playground API contract.

balances.description: Per-account starting balances. Outer key is the account name (no `@`); inner map is asset → integer units.

metadata.description: Per-account metadata to seed the engine with. Outer key is the account name; inner map is key → string value.
